tagline: Team up. Solve code bounties. Level up.

designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — Bold, energetic, playful block layout with geometric shapes, high color contrast, duotone effects, and modern dark/light duality. Code-centric aesthetics with monospace typography for headings.

screenDetails.home: Daily Code Bounties feed with featured bounty card, bounty list with difficulty/lang badges, and horizontal DevDrops carousel
screenDetails.squads: Active squad status with progress bar, open squads browser with recruit/join actions, create squad flow
screenDetails.workbench: Spatial 3D-style canvas with draggable DevDrop and code snippet cards, SVG connector lines, card detail panel
screenDetails.profile: User stats header, tabbed view of Tech Artifacts grid / global leaderboard / streak heatmap

theme.toggle: accessible theme toggle in bottom nav bar
